markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Raksha Umesh for the Account Executive role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Dual Sales & CS Experience:** Raksha has a balanced background, including founding AE at Storyblock (closed T-Mobile's first 6-figure deal) and Account Manager at Sanity, where the role is already AE-like (discovery, upsell, contracts).](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [**Process Builder:** At Storyblock, Raksha built the first sales playbook and knowledge base to navigate complex enterprise deals (e.g., a 4-month RFP for T-Mobile) without dedicated support teams.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [**GrowthX Fit:** Raksha is attracted to GrowthX's content/AI focus and is comfortable with the role's dual nature: high-velocity, low-ACV product sales alongside high-ACV, white-glove services.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)
  - [**Reason for Leaving:** Sanity is shifting AMs to a core outbound model with 3x higher targets, which Raksha feels is unrealistic and sets the team up for failure.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=3018.0)

## Topics

### Background & Motivation

  - [**Experience:** Balanced career in pre-sales, sales, and post-sales.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [**Current Role (Sanity):** Account Manager with significant AE overlap (discovery, multi-threading, contracts, upsell).](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**Motivation for AE Role:** The current AM role is already AE-like, making a formal AE transition logical.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**Interest in GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [**Content & AI:** Strong background in the content space (Sanity, Storyblock) and AI (chatbots).](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
      - [**"Building in Public":** Followed GrowthX's journey since July 2024.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)

### Sales Process & Playbook

  - [**Storyblock (Founding AE):**](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Navigating complex enterprise deals (e.g., 4-month T-Mobile RFP) without dedicated support teams.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [**Solution:** Built the first sales playbook and knowledge base to standardize processes and centralize information.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [**Sales Process Framework:**](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
      - [**Multi-threading:** Identify and build relationships with 3–4 key stakeholders across departments (champion, influencer, economic buyer, budget holder).](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
      - [**Discovery:** Book next calls live during meetings to avoid email delays.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
      - [**Scoping:** Define user seats, environments, and data usage to structure the proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
      - [**Procurement:** Anticipate and buffer for contract redlining and legal reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2379.0)

### Deal Example: Sanity Expansion

  - [**Deal:** Expansion at The Motley Fool (Q2).](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [**Source:** Proactive discovery with an existing champion uncovered a new business unit in Australia.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
    1.  [**Discovery:** Initial call with the new unit.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
    2.  [**Technical Deep Dive:** Solutions Engineer call on frameworks and hosting.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
    3.  [**POC Workshop:** Hands-on session to scope needs.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
    4.  [**Scoping & Proposal:** Structured a proposal based on user seats and data SKUs.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
    5.  [**Negotiation:** Standard sales tactics to close by quarter-end.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2045.0)
    6.  [**Procurement:** Navigated contract redlining (e.g., auto-renewal, liability) and an AI security addendum.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
  - [**Outcome:** Closed on the last day of the quarter after a \~2.5-month cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2122.0)
  - [**Self-Critique:**](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2164.0)
      - [**Rating:** 8/10.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)
      - [**Gap to 10:** Could have discovered more use cases for future pipeline and buffered for procurement to close earlier.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2164.0)

### GrowthX AE Role & Compensation

  - [**Role Evolution:**](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Product Launch):** High-velocity, lower-ACV ($15–20k) sales.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2963.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Services):** Higher-ACV, white-glove deals.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2713.0)
  - [**Services Deal Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2833.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** 8-week strategy sprint ($30–40k fixed fee).](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2833.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** 12-month term, $15k/mo ($180k ACV).](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2833.0)
      - [**Example:** Brex deal was over $400k ARR.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2833.0)
  - [**Compensation:** 3% of revenue brought in, with kickers up to 5%.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Provide positive feedback to the team.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=3008.0)
  - [**Bridget & Tucker:** Contact Raksha with next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/UFXiVSo5BbzzH2xC42eCsazG2xzVVPJW?tab=summary&timestamp=3105.0)
